title: ophrys × neoruppertii
intro: Ophrys × neoruppertii, also known as the bee orchid, is a hybrid orchid plant that belongs to the family Orchidaceae. The plant's roots, flowers, and leaves are used in herbal medicine due to their medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antibacterial properties. The health benefits of Ophrys × neoruppertii include its ability to aid in wound healing, reduce fever, and alleviate digestive issues. Ophrys × neoruppertii is typically used in herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, but its use should be consulted with a medical professional before consumption.
